compiled_state.title: Integrate Gate 2c into fix-bug SKILL.md
compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart
compiled_state.description:
Add Gate 2c (test regression analysis) to fix-bug SKILL.md post-investigation.

The section:
- Pipes proposed fix diff to gate-2c-test-regression-check.py via stdin
- Passes --intent-aligned from Gate 1a result, --test-dir for test location
- If triggered:true -> primary signal
- Error handling: construct full 5-field gate signal on failure with triggered:false
- Documents specific->specific exemption (same assertion type, both literal values)
- Documents 1a->2c suppression interaction (epic SC3)
- Documents trigger policy: any removal/broadening is independent signal
- References gate-signal-schema.md contract (story 4b97-bd9d dep)
- Position: after fix proposal, before commit (post-investigation workflow)

TDD: GREEN -- implement until Task 3 tests pass.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] All RED tests pass
  Verify: cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && python -m pytest tests/skills/test_fix_bug_gate_2c.py -q
- [ ] SKILL.md contains Gate 2c section
  Verify: grep -q 'Gate 2c' plugins/dso/skills/fix-bug/SKILL.md
- [ ] References test regression script
  Verify: grep -q 'gate-2c-test-regression-check' plugins/dso/skills/fix-bug/SKILL.md
- [ ] Documents specific->specific exemption
  Verify: grep -qi 'specific.*specific' plugins/dso/skills/fix-bug/SKILL.md
- [ ] Gate appears in post-investigation section
  Verify: python3 -c "c=open('plugins/dso/skills/fix-bug/SKILL.md').read(); assert 'Gate 2c' in c; assert c.index('Gate 2c') > c.index('Step 4') if 'Step 4' in c else True"

comments.body: AC amendment (gap analysis): (1) Gate 2c adds a primary signal to the gate signal accumulator — it does NOT independently block the fix. Story a2f0-9641 (escalation routing) handles the routing decision based on total signal count. (2) Diff source: Gate 2c receives the working tree diff (git diff after fix sub-agent writes changes, before commit). Specify in SKILL.md: pipe output of 'git diff -- <test-files>' to the script. (3) Exact placement: Gate 2c runs after fix implementation (Step 6) and before verification (Step 7), as Step 6.5.
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 4/6: Implementation complete ✓ — Gate 2c section added to SKILL.md between Gate 2b and Gate 2d
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: Fixed: Gate 2c integrated into SKILL.md — 7/7 tests pass
comments.author: Joe Oakhart
